/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gpu_sensor_runtime.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sensor_runtime.dir/src/data_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sensor_runtime.dir/src/loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sensor_runtime.dir/src/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sensor_runtime.dir/src/inference_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sensor_runtime.dir/src/fusion.cpp.o -o gpu_sensor_runtime
